data.title: Marti Technologies, Inc. will report 2025 First Half Results on September 22, 2025. Conference call/webcast at 3:30 p.m. Istanbul.
data.description: In Istanbul, Marti Technologies, Inc. (Marti) (NYSE American: MRT) will release its financial and operational data for the six months concluding on June 30, 2025, before the U.S. market opens on Monday, September 22, 2025. To review the 2025 First Half Results, there will be an analyst and investor conference call with a live webcast at 3:30 p.m. Istanbul / 1:30 p. The leading mobility super app in Turkey, Marti, will be the focus of discussion during this event.

data.title: SEALSQ CEO to keynote at IQT Quantum+AI 2025 in NYC, discussing AI and quantum cybersecurity. Panel with leading executives.
data.description: SEALSQ Corp (NASDAQ: LAES), based in Geneva, Switzerland, specializes in developing and marketing Semiconductors, PKI, and Post-Quantum technology hardware and software products. CEO Carlos Moreira is set to deliver the opening keynote at IQT Quantum + AI 2025 in New York City from October 19 to 21. The keynote, "AI Meets Quantum: Building Unbreakable Post-Quantum Security," will explore the intersection of artificial intelligence and quantum computing and their implications for cybersecurity. Alongside this, Moreira will join the CEO Roundtable discussion in Panel 8, alongside executives from Rigetti, ORCA, SEEQC, and Arqit.

data.title: Drone mapping market to reach $6.7 billion by 2035 as governments and companies embrace drones for various applications.
data.description: In today's fast-paced world, drones are becoming the go-to choice for both governments and businesses for various tasks such as real-time decision-making, land surveying, mapping, and preventive maintenance. This trend is expected to propel the market further, with significant growth anticipated. The adoption of drones is on the rise as they offer efficient solutions and value in diverse sectors. This shift indicates a promising future for the drone industry, with a remarkable surge in demand for such services.

data.title: Counsel Press Inc. acquires Firefly Legal to boost service of process market growth, based in Mokena, Illinois.
data.description: Today in New York, Counsel Press Inc., a top provider of technology-driven litigation support, revealed their recent acquisition of Firefly Legal to enhance their presence in the service of process sector. Firefly Legal, based in Mokena, Illinois, is a reputable company known for its expertise in legal procedures. This move marks a significant development for Counsel Press Inc. as they aim to expand their operations and consolidate their position in the market.

data.title: George Butler, 'Pumping Iron' filmmaker, inducted into Gold's Gym Hall of Fame at 60th anniversary event in Venice Beach, CA.
data.description: Renowned documentarian recognized at the 60th anniversary celebration of Gold's Gym for his significant influence on the bodybuilding and fitness community in Venice Beach, California on September 18, 2025. Gold's Gym, a well-known fitness brand recognized for its history in strength and performance training, honored George for his contributions.

data.title: Bubble names Leighton Meester first Global Ambassador for its "Radical Joy" campaign. Redefining clinical skincare.
data.description: Bubble has introduced its first 360 campaign titled "Radical Joy," which showcases the efficacy of playful, clinically-supported skincare products. The brand, based in New York, revealed this campaign on September 18, 2025. Bubble is known for its unique approach to clinical skincare, and it has enlisted actress Leighton Meester to be part of the campaign.
Dan Newhouse, a Congress member, revealed new stock trades in BRO, BLK, ADP, AMAT, AME, and 11 others.

data.title: Leverage ChatGPT for crypto trading signals in real-time, including market analysis and strategy with AI. #trading #AI
data.description: Utilizing ChatGPT as a supportive companion can greatly benefit traders in their decision-making process. Through leveraging AI technology, traders can access advanced market analysis tools, interpret sentiment signals, and develop effective trading strategies. By incorporating ChatGPT into their trading routine, traders can access a wealth of information and insights to enhance their trading performance.

data.title: T-Mobile raises quarterly dividend by 16% to $1.02 per share, payable on Dec 11, 2025 to stockholders of record on Nov 26.
data.description: In Bellevue, Washington, T-Mobile US, Inc. (NASDAQ: TMUS) revealed that its Board of Directors has approved a cash dividend of $1.02 per share for its common stock. This represents a 16% increase from the last quarter, amounting to $0.14 more per share. The dividend is set to be disbursed on December 11, 2025, to stockholders listed on the record as of the end of business on November 26, 2025. T-Mobile US, Inc. is known for its innovative services in the telecommunications sector.

data.title: Bluebox introduces Ice-as-a-Service for multi-unit franchisees in convenience and grocery sectors in Orlando, Florida.
data.description: Bluebox has recently revealed an expansion of its Ice-as-a-Service solution to eligible multi-unit franchisees operating in the convenience and grocery sectors. The innovative service is aimed at providing convenience and grocery store owners with a new solution for their ice needs. The expansion signifies Bluebox's commitment to catering to a broader market within these sectors, offering a valuable service that simplifies ice management for businesses. This move is anticipated to significantly impact franchisees in these sectors, with a focus on enhancing operational efficiency and customer satisfaction.

data.title: AI chat interface Ask Evidently deployed across major health systems supports thousands of clinicians daily.
data.description: A chat interface AI named Ask Evidently has been introduced in Palo Alto, California, becoming the first of its kind to seamlessly integrate into any Electronic Health Record (EHR) system. This innovative tool is actively used by thousands of clinicians on a daily basis.

data.title: Korean Cultural Center NY to showcase "Nam June Paik: The Communicator" exhibit from Sept 26 - Nov 22, 2025, with opening ceremony on Sept 23 (6-8 PM).
data.description: From September 26 to November 22, 2025, the Korean Cultural Center New York will host an exhibition showcasing a visionary's efforts in advancing human freedom through art and technology. The Opening Ceremony is scheduled for September 23 from 6 to 8 PM at the Gallery and Atrium. This promising event in New York aims to bring together individuals interested in exploring the intersection of art and technology.

data.title: Dunya Analytics offers free industry-leading biodiversity risk screener to measure and manage business risks.
data.description: Dunya Analytics has introduced new tools to assist businesses in monitoring and handling risks tied to biodiversity and nature loss. The announcement was made in Wilmington, Delaware on September 18, 2025. As a key player in biodiversity and nature risk analytics, Dunya Analytics launched a free platform to aid companies in this endeavor.

data.title: Peppr introduces Grow, a solution helping restaurants compete with big chains by enhancing online presence and driving sales.
data.description: A restaurant technology company named Peppr, based in Dallas, revealed on September 18, 2025, its mission to assist independent restaurants in competing with larger chains. With Grow's services, restaurants can achieve higher website rankings, benefit from commission-free ordering, and engage in marketing strategies to retain customers. This initiative aims to empower restaurants to thrive in a competitive industry by providing essential tools and resources.

data.title: AIChE awards 2025 Langer Prize to Mark Blenner for microplastics research, supporting solutions for recovery, degradation, upcycling.
data.description: A researcher has received a grant from the American Institute of Chemical Engineers (AIChE) in New York on September 18, 2025. The grant aims to support the development of cost-effective solutions for addressing microplastics. The researcher will focus on initiatives related to microplastics recovery, degradation, and upcycling. This grant signifies a milestone in the efforts to combat plastic pollution, with the funding provided by the AIChE playing a crucial role in advancing innovative approaches.

data.title: US natural gas producer orders beyond 150 Capstone microturbines from distributor E-Finity for Marcellus Shale operations.
data.description: In Los Angeles, Capstone Green Energy Holdings, Inc. (CGEH) along with Capstone Green Energy, LLC, shared news of a recent development. E-Finity Distributed Generation, their distributor for the Mid-Atlantic, Southeastern United States, and the Caribbean regions, has successfully received an additional order. This follow-on order was obtained from a prominent natural gas producer in the nation. The order comprises a pre-installed skid that incorporates three C65 microturbines and E-Finity’s m-TIM controller. The skid is scheduled for commissioning soon.

data.title: Replimune met with FDA regarding CRL for RP1 with nivolumab for advanced melanoma treatment.
data.description: On September 16, 2025, in Woburn, Massachusetts, Replimune Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: REPL) disclosed that it successfully concluded a Type A meeting with the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) regarding the complete response letter (CRL) for their Biologics License Application (BLA) for RP1 in conjunction with nivolumab aimed at treating advanced melanoma. This event marks a significant milestone as the company progresses in pioneering novel oncolytic immunotherapies.
